headline: Teenager charged over Primrose Hill stabbing
body: An 18-year-old is accused of grievous bodily harm with intent, following the death of Finbar Sullivan.

headline: Man jailed for murder of deaf woman on night out
body: Owusu, 36, attacked Mukhtar after forcing her out of an overcrowded Mercedes in Romford.

headline: Misconduct inquiry over fatal schoolgirl crash
body: The families of Nuria Sajjad and Selena Lau, who died at an end-of-term tea party, say the initial investigation was flawed.

headline: Woman jumps off third floor balcony to escape fire
body: The blaze was caused by an e-bike battery charging in the flat's hallway, say firefighters.

headline: Al Fayed enablers 'must face accountability', survivors say
body: Two survivors want to see those who enabled Al Fayed to carry out his abuse to face justice.

headline: Lib Dems 'local champions who get things done'
body: Sir Ed said the Lib Dems would be fielding the largest number of candidates for more than 30 years.

headline: Arsenal injury update: Declan Rice, Bukayo Saka, Martin Odegaard latest news and return dates
body: Fresh concern for Gunners ahead of Sporting and Man City showdowns

headline: Government gives thumbs up to Telegraph’s £575m German takeover
body: Politico and Business Insider owner Axel Springer struck the deal to buy the Telegraph Media Group last month.

headline: Convoy of tractors causes traffic disruption in Belfast
body: A protest is due to be held at Leinster House on Tuesday, to coincide with a confidence vote in the government.

headline: ‘Callous and selfish’ killer jailed for life over death of deaf woman
body: Duane Owusu threw aspiring accountant Zahwa Mukhtar out of an overcrowded Mercedes car and felled her with a single strike.

headline: Murdered student's father says he 'wanted to hold dying son's hand' as second man charged over Primrose Hill stabbing
body: Khalid Abdulqadir, 18, has been charged with grievous bodily harm with intent, violent disorder and possession of a knife

headline: All buttoned up: How the skirt suit reclaimed its cool status in 2026
body: The skirt suit has gone from the matriarch’s fashion MO to an it-girl go-to
